title: Google IPL 2026 doodle celebrates start of IPL with live scores, upcoming matches and more
body: Google celebrates the IPL 2026 season with a vibrant, interactive doodle featuring animated cricket elements and glowing effects. The doodle, in a purple neon theme, redirects users to a dedicated portal for live scores,

title: Man claims AI bot helped uncover his uncle's decades-old undiagnosed condition
body: A man claimed that a conversation with Claude AI helped identify undiagnosed sleep apnoea in his 62-year-old uncle after 25 years, connecting symptoms that multiple specialists had missed.

title: Here's Why Hecla Mining Crushed the Market Today
body: The silver miner is increasing its exposure to the metal and that's good news today.

title: OpenAI pulls the plug on Sora, the viral AI video app that sparked deepfake concerns
body: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — OpenAI is shutting down its social media app Sora, which went viral last fall as a place to share short-form videos generated by artificial intelligence but also raised alarms in Hollywood and elsewhere.

title: Clear contracts, new tech. Can California's insurance woes be fixed?

title: Anthropic struggling with Chinese competition, its own safety obsession
body: That may not be soon enough to avoid the undertow of financial pressure, competition from China, and the challenge of delivering AI models that provide some measure of safety without sacrificing too much utility.

title: Anthropic's Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
body: Estimates for total Claude consumer users are all over the map (we've seen figures ranging from 18 million to 30 million). Anthropic hasn't disclosed this data, but a spokesperson did tell TechCrunch that Claude paid subscriptions have more than doubled this year.

title: Cybersecurity Stocks Slide Following Anthropic 'Claude Mythos' Data Leak

title: Anthropic rate-limits Claude after a surge in demand
body: Anthropic is tightening and loosening the spigot on Claude at the same time. Facing a sharp rise in usage across its AI assistant's tiers, the company has rolled out a two-week promotional window that doubles off-peak capacity for most users,

title: What is Anthropic Claude Mythos? Everything to know about viral leaked AI model that set alarms in cybersecurity
body: In an official statement, Anthropic confirmed that the exposure was unintentional and attributed it to a misconfiguration rather than a sophisticated breach.

title: 80,000 Claude Users Reveal AI's Promise And Folly
body: Anthropic's study of 80,000 Claude users shows AI moving from productivity into healthcare, education, and judgment, revealing AI's next markets and its deepest tensions.

title: Researchers Challenge OpenAI Defence After Claiming ChatGPT Can Output Near-Verbatim Copies of Published Books
body: A new study claims finetuning AI models such as GPT-4o can extract up to 90% of copyrighted books, raising questions for ongoing copyright lawsuits.

title: The Decadelong Feud Shaping the Future of AI
body: Unhealed personal wounds and past power struggles between the leaders of OpenAI and Anthropic are defining how the world now encounters the technology.

title: A New Digital Twin for Brain Activity Aims to Speed Research
body: Researchers demonstrates a revolutionary AI foundation model capable of predicting human brain activity from multisensory stimuli.

title: Social media is populist and polarising; AI may be the opposite
body: Every media revolution has transformed who distributes information, what messages are distributed and what form they take. As such, some media are fundamentally democratising and polarising, widening the pool of publishers and views beyond a narrow elite and amplifying radical and anti-establishment voices.

title: Exclusive: Anthropic acknowledges testing new AI model representing 'step change' in capabilities, after accidental data leak reveals its existence
body: AI company Anthropic is testing a previously undisclosed AI model called Mythos that is significantly more capable than anything it has previously built, according to a draft blog post left publicly accessible.

title: The 6 Google Gemini voice commands for Android that keep me productive and informed
body: I never got hooked on voice assistants, as they never really delivered on their promise. Gemini changes that. The AI assistant significantly improves the voice experience to the point that I have gone from not using voice commands at all to heavily relying on them every day to stay productive and informed.

title: Google Gemini Lets Users Bring Chat History from Other Chatbots
body: Google Gemini now lets users import chat history from other AI chatbots, making it easier to switch while keeping past conversations and personal preferences intact.

title: Yes, AI will impact jobs. No, you don't need to panic.
body: The loudest voices in the artificial intelligence debate are getting it wrong: AI isn't going to radically transform the economy overnight. The bad news about that is we aren't going to enter a world of unlimited leisure time anytime soon. The good news is we aren't on the precipice of a massive surge in unemployment from AI replacing workers.

title: Inside Bissell's 48-Hour AI Sprint That Changed How It Uses Data
body: Bissell cut through AI hype by building five real workflows in just two days, turning skepticism into measurable results across customer service and analytics.

title: "AI, deeptech firms are overcrowding seed-stage funding rounds," says Kae Capital's Abhishek Srivastava
body: In an interview with Ayanti Bera, General Partner Abhishek Srivastava speaks about the surge in AI funding, how seed-stage economics are changing, and how current geopolitical tensions can impact venture funding.

title: Investors caught between AI utopia and AI doom loop

title: 授業で25％が生成AI使用 児童・生徒、調査や作文の助言など―5人に1人「勉強不要に」・民間調査
body: 小・中学校の授業での生成ＡＩ（人工知能）利用状況を教科書会社「光村図書出版」（東京都品川区）が２８日までに調べたところ、児童・生徒の約４人に１人が経験があると回答した。分からないことの調査や作文へのアドバイスといった目的で利用しており、約５人に１人は、ＡＩがあれば勉強が不要になると考えていることも分かった。

title: 韓国・スマホ利用者の約半数が生成AI活用…20代はClaude、40代はGrokが主流
body: 【03月28日 KOREA WAVE】韓国でスマートフォン利用者の約半数が生成型AIアプリを使用していることが分かった。世代別では20代はClaude、40代はGrokの利用が目立つ。 調査会社によると、2026年2月時点で生成AIアプリの利用者は約2494万人で、全体の48.7％に達した。2025年同月の22.3％から大幅に増加している。

title: オープンAIの動画生成｢ソラ｣終了は上場のため？ 3カ月前にディズニーと3年間のライセンス契約を結んだばかり
body: オープンAIは、2024年に発表した動画生成技術「ソラ（Sora）」の提供を終了する。 SoraはAIを用い、ハリウッドのスタジオが制作したかのようなショート動画をすばやく作り出す能力によって、エンターテインメント業界に衝撃を与えていた。 3カ月前にはディズニーと3年間のライセンス契約を結び、Soraの利用者がミッキーマウスやシンデレラ、ヨーダといったディズニーのキャラクターを使った動画を生成でき

title: QommonsAI、個人情報の自動検知・禁止ワードブロック・検知ログの3層防御を搭載 ― 「使わせたいが、漏らさせない」自治体の情報 ...
body: QommonsAIは今回、 「個人情報自動検知」「禁止ワードブロック」「検知・ブロックログ」の3層防御 を搭載することで、「職員一人ひとりの判断に頼らず、システムとして漏洩を防ぐ」環境を実現しました。これにより、自治体は「使わせたいが、漏らさせない」という相反する要請を両立し、生成AIの利活用を安心して推進できるようになります。

title: 就活のこつって？職種選びに生成AI活用、自己PRには具体性を…上越市で高校生向けセミナー
body: 就職活動を控える高校２年生向けのセミナーが、 上越市 本城町の高田城址（じょうし）公園オーレンプラザで開かれた。上越市と 糸魚川市 、 十日町市 の計９校から４００人以上の生徒が参加し、志望する業界や職種の絞り ...
